instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that builds a category trail from a flat `categories` list (maps with `id`, `name`, `parentId`). Walk parent links from `currentCategoryId` upward, then render names in root-to-leaf order separated by " / ". Escape names.
code:
<#-- Model: categories: [{ id, name, parentId }], currentCategoryId: string -->
<#assign trail = []>
<#assign cursor = currentCategoryId!"">
<#list 1..20 as _>
  <#if !cursor?has_content><#break></#if>
  <#assign match = "">
  <#list categories![] as cat>
    <#if cat.id == cursor>
      <#assign trail = [cat] + trail>
      <#assign cursor = cat.parentId!"">
      <#assign match = cat.id>
      <#break>
    </#if>
  </#list>
  <#if !match?has_content><#break></#if>
</#list>
<nav aria-label="Category trail">
  <#list trail as crumb>
    ${crumb.name?html}<#if crumb?has_next> / </#if>
  </#list>
</nav>
